content: Telegram Bot API: getMe returns { ok: true, result: { id: number, is_bot: true, first_name: string, username?: string } } — for invalid token returns { ok: false, error_code: 401, description: 'Unauthorized' }. setWebhook accepts { url: string, secret_token?: string (1-256 chars, A-Za-z0-9_-) } and returns Boolean true on success. deleteWebhook accepts optional { drop_pending_updates?: boolean } and returns Boolean true. Re-registration pattern: always call deleteWebhook before setWebhook to avoid 'another webhook is active' conflict.
